items.example: Someone stole my phone on the bus.
Two men robbed the bank yesterday.
Our house was burgled while we were on holiday.
The police arrested the suspect early this morning.
He was sent to prison for five years.
She had to pay a fine for parking illegally.
The case will go to court next month.
The crime rate has gone down in recent years.
The victim called the police immediately.
A witness saw the car speeding away.
